title: APEX Supabase Knowledge Schema And Import Assets Tranche Movement
objective: Execute the bounded Supabase knowledge-schema and import-assets tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by moving only the approved study-content schema, NETA import seeds, and supporting knowledge-domain import references into explicit knowledge-domain homes while preserving domain-specific non-authority treatment and avoiding PM/project, automation, deployment-utility, runtime, or generic schema promotion.
active_role: APEX Knowledge Schema And Import Assets Movement Operator
dependency_note: Packet 001 defined the tranche boundaries and packet 001c closed the automation/orchestration slice. Packet 001d is the next bounded Supabase decomposition lane and is limited to knowledge-schema and import-assets only.
constrained_outputs: A bounded movement pass for the approved Supabase knowledge-schema and import-assets tranche
Imported schema, seed, and script lineage under infra/database/knowledge/source-lineage/apex-resa and supporting knowledge-domain docs under docs/architecture/knowledge-domain
An execution handoff documenting exact moved slices, preserved exclusions, and explicit domain-specific non-authority treatment
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001d moves only the approved knowledge-schema and import-assets slice and does not collapse all remaining Supabase documentation into the same lane
Confirm the imported assets are labeled and placed as knowledge-domain source lineage or supporting reference only, not active schema authority
Confirm PM/project/PSS lineage, automation/orchestration, deployment-utility, and archive tranches remain untouched
Confirm no runtime code, active migrations, or knowledge publication surfaces are changed
sql_permission_note: Packet 001d authorizes only bounded physical movement of approved Supabase knowledge-schema and import assets into knowledge-domain lineage homes. It does not authorize schema promotion, runtime changes, SQL execution, publication rewrites, or deploy-utility movement.
